reviews.text:
Roof shield was fantastic to deal with from the very beginning right through the process. Rich was informative and helpful and worked to get us good value. He explained the entire process in detail and why each step was important.
The team who did the work were friendly, respectful and efficient. So glad we went with Roofshield.

Roof restored 6 years ago. Have already had it redone once due to peeling. Now the company has changed hands and the hoops we have to jump through to have the 10 year warranty upheld is insane. Have been told that engaging QBCC is the only way they will come back to do it. Don't spend your money with them.

Our experience with Roofshield was a incredibly disappointing, and one star is too high! The initial sales presentation was compelling with a lot of promises made! Roofshields quote was the highest, and once we signed the contract that's where it all ended! Failure to show up after weeks of promises to start the job with no communication or explanation! When they did show up and they did the initial clean and paint, our gutters and downpipes were left completely clogged with a large amount of old paint. So with the first heavy rain our gutters flooded, and we had to get up and clean the gutters and downpipes ourselves! Yes unbelievably the roof was finally painted but just before forecasted showers, so as you would expect the paint ran and we had bare patches all over the roof. This also made us highly dubious about the number of coats initially applied because drum of paint left at our place had only a very small amount used (still almost a full drum). Despite the patches all over the roof we were sent the invoice asking for payment! After weeks (6-7) of repeated broken promises to return (I will be there on _______ day) and no-shows and no communication, they finally returned and repainted the roof! At no stage during our dealings with Roofshield were we rude or demanding, in fact we were the perfet customers even lending their workers equipment so they could complete the work. We would NOT recommend Roofshield and have since had friends and family ask about our experiences, to which we said NO do yourself a BIG favour and avoid disappointment and use another roof restoration company! We have other properties that require roof restoration and we will not be approaching Roofshield!

Really appreciate the prompt help and good advice you were able to provide in addressing the immediate issues with the roof and being able to get the restoration completed in a very timely manner. Great contact throughout and photos sent to me at each visit to help me understand the issues and resolutions. Completed the work in conjunction with a solar installation and provide great advice on what would be the best order of work for me as the homeowner.

Roofshield recently restored our 30 year old concrete tiles (we are a block of 13 Townhouses).  We could not be happier with the workmanship, attention to detail and politeness of all staff and tradespeople.  Thank you Roofshield, for the care you took with our property.  Christine.

Spent $10,000 in 2024 on a full roof restoration, after 'the boss', according to the sales rep named Larry , repeatedly promised to fix our leaking roof. We didn't really need the full restoration but went ahead with it anyway as we just wanted the leaking roof fixed and were told they'd only fix the roof if we paid for the full restoration
Had a team come and work on our roof for a day but were unable to fix the leaking issue. We showed them the entry point to the inside of the roof but none of them went through the hatch to have a look. Two guys even came back the next day, to have another crack at the roof, but were soon pulled off the job by management, and were told (according to them) that they'd already spent too much time working on our roof.
Of course no discount on the $10,000 was offered.
Fast forward to early 2026 and my wife climbs up inside the roof and soon realises the problem. If you want your roof fixed DON'T use Roofshield. My wife can do it for a few bottles of plonk

I can't thank you enough for the professionalism and high quality solid work by Pete on restoring our roof.  You turned up, quoted, secured the job, arrived on time every day, finished within the scheduled time.  Nothing was too much trouble for Pete, always with a smile on his face and expert attention to detail, he truly wanted an awesome result as if it was his own roof.  Thankyou Tony for being a total professional & getting us going, thanks for adding value to our home and making it look a million bucks!

6 months after roof restoration, water stain showed up, came and said it should be the old leak taking months to show up on ceiling.

18 months later, more water stain showed. Email and phone call many times but no response. Once they take the money, they don’t care anymore. The 10 year warranty is just useless and yet, they did ask you to pay for the warranty.

Fantastic service and quick turnaround time. We had our old tin roof replaced with a new Colorbond one. The process was done within a few days and the quality of the install was outstanding. Would highly recommend.

Many thanks to Rebecca and to Wade who carried out our roof restoration. Rebecca made the whole process very straightforward and checked in regularly on progress.Wade was very efficient, obliging and delivered a very professional result. Our roof looks as new and I have absolutely no hesitation in recommending Roofshield.

I am delighted with my fixed and repainted roof. I had several broken or chipped tiles and cracked capping and the very dull old brown tiles made the rest of the new house paint and renovation look lacklustre. However, it looks fabulous now and really finishes of the exterior of the house brilliantly. The price was very reasonable too. The staff were amazing, very professional and responsive. Barry did the initial quote and ensured the job was booked in well within the time before I was going away for a two-month trip. The office staff were consistent with their communication, both via the phone and email. Peter did the actual work and was wonderful. He worked so hard on extremely hot days and around the wet weather. He made sure everything was cleaned thoroughly and that there was no dirt on the house or pathways after the roof cleaning stage, even handwashing any marks off the new house paint rather than using the pressure cleaner. He was equally thorough and careful to ensure there was no overspray from the roof paint. I could not have asked for better service. The quality of the care, workmanship and finished product exceeded my expectations.

One star is too much and not earned. The work was carried out in Aug ‘23. We have discovered a few months ago that leaks had been happening into two cupboards right underneath the valley that was replaced. Contact was made with Roofshield and, despite the business operations being based in Brisbane, I was assured that the issues would be examined and addressed. I have contacted Rich on numerous occasions both by text and phone and was advised his “very reliable Peter” would be in touch. More than two weeks have elapsed and I’m still waiting for a simple “Hello”. Needless to say, with all the rain in Sydney recently, the urgency has escalated and a new roofing contractor has been engaged satisfactorily. At the very least using Roofshield anywhere outside of Brisbane would be a waste of time on the road to continued frustration. In Brisbane I’d get more quotes too. It turns out the valley I was promised (wider) has not been fitted and is, in fact, the same 10 inches model it supposedly replaced. Judge for yourself.

Great customer service, Rich was really friendly and helpful and very professional and went out of his way to ensure we were totally happy with our roof. Highly recommend Rich and Roofshield for anyone looking to have their roof restored

I was very happy with my roof restoration completed by Shaun and the team from Roofshield.  Shaun was a pleasure to deal with, he communicated with us well and worked through an extremely hot heatwave. He was incredibly tidy and after cleaning the roof down you would not even realise he had been there, no mess was left behind. I would have no hesitation in recommending Shaun and the team to anyone looking for a quality roof restoration.

Rich from Roofshield is the ultimate professional. Provided very good service and advice prior to and post the roof restoration works. I will be referring him and his organisation to friends and family. Thanks Rich.

We are far more than impressed with the roof restoration process we have had done very recently.  Shaun  was EXCELLENT and his work of the highest standard.  We can very highly recommend him to anyone. A very valuable employee to have.
We couldn't be happier with the result, very impressed indeed.
Thank you Roofshield and Thank you Shaun !
Rich went over and above to assist with works on my property. He provided the type of service that is sadly lacking in the industry at present. Thanks again Rich!

My great roof restoration experience started with Rebecca. Rebecca came and inspected the roof of my house. Provided me with an honest overview of what needed to be done to restore the roof.She was very helpful and patient as I had to think about the right colour I wanted the roof to be painted.  I also had quotes from other companies and after what seemed to be an easy decision I chose Roofshield. I am so glad that I did. The customer service I received from Rebecca, the office and Wayne, who completed the restoration was wonderful. The paint colour I chose from a swatch was a perfect match. My whole house looks like new now. Wayne provided a great service, cleaned up any mess and it was all finished in the time allocated. Overall I would definitely recommend Roofshield. Great service, great product and great price. Many thanks to all concerned.

We were very pleased with the service Roofshield provided and very happy with the restoration and painting of our cement-tiled roof. Larry was fantastic to deal with for the quotation and booking process and Wayne, who did the actual work on our roof,  was terrific to deal with and very professional. Our roof looks as good as new!  I would certainly recommend Roofshield without hesitation.

My husband and I would like to thank Roofshield & Peter for a very professional & amazing quality service on our roof restoration. Peter was very thorough from start to finish and always communicated with us so we knew what was happening. We are so happy with the outcome and would highly recommend Roofshield Restorations to anyone looking to have their roof restored.
Thank you so much guys!

Thankyou to Richard to arranged a competitive quote to have my roof restored and to Pete who worked tirelessly to restore the roof to brand new. If you are in need of a restoration, dont look anywhere else as these guys are perfect for your job. Thanks heaps RoofShield

I would like to thank Roofshield for the great job they did of our roof restoration.
Rebecca was fantastic and did a great job of answering all our questions and queries, nothing was too much trouble.
Wade was also great and took pride in his work. He did a very professional job and I was very happy with his attitude.
Once again a great job from a great team
Regards
John
SO helpful, cannot recommend them enough! Really quick, friendly and transparent with the whole process. Went above and beyond, incredible value for money too, gave me a great deal!

Very impressed with Roofshield's service.  Shaun was very meticulous with his work and very pleased with the quality of work and kept me well informed with the progress of works.  I highly recommend Roofshield to anyone looking to have their roof restored.
Fantastic service, super efficient and helpful. Rich was amazing, helping sort our roof on the day I called to ensure our bathroom renovation was not impacted.

Fantastic work by Sunshine Coast Roofshield. Rebecca contacted me within 12 hours of email inquiry, quoted within 24 hours and didn't pad the quote with unnecessary add on's. Honest reliable and great workmanship.
Amazing service & quality roof restoration! Friendly staff were knowledgeable and made our roof water tight after months of leaks and water damage. First class operation!
Very helpful, prompt and honest. Repair survived Cycline Alfred, which speaks volumes.

Great company to deal with,  nothing was a problem and no question was silly.

Love the finish

Wayne was very friendly and explained each step.

Highly recommend
First class service Richard came out at Christmas  very prompt great service fair price highly recommend
Shaun was very professional with the job task. I was very satisfied with the final result. Thumbs up

Jimmy and Rich did a wonderful job
Our house looks great with its new colour
Professional and good value
Very professional, from start to finish.  Everyone were very helpful, made the whole experience super easy. Delivered what was promised. Outstanding quality!

Michael & his team were excellent, went above & beyond.
Extremely happy with my roof, would highly recommend them.
The guy who carried out the work was just a subcontractor, not a qualified roofer.
From start to finish - the job could not be faulted. Fantastic staff, great teamwork and the finish is phenomenal. Thanks heaps...
Very impressive job. Totally impressed with all aspects of the job from quoting to completion.
Great service.  Great customer service.  Would definitely recommend.

We experienced initial  frustration dealing with Roofshield's admin staff pushing back on our request to rectify  a leak in our roof  (which was under warranty) with staff stating it was due to a weather event which should be managed by our insurer or a tarp and that rain was not covered under the warranty. The admin staff member demonstrated little understanding of the right to restitution under the warranty or the urgency arising from the rapidly escalating damage to the internal ceiling. This  subsequently delayed a referral to the warranty team. However,  we would like to pass on our sincere appreciation to Rich the roofer who not only efficiently identified and rectified the cause of the leak, but did an amazing job cleaning the significant mould build up on the ceiling. He then went well above and beyond by taking the opportunity to  also clean a build up of mould, remove flaking paint and fix a hole in the gable; but also to clean mould he noticed on the garage door, as a way of apologizing for the inconvenience we had experienced. Rich single-handedly renewed our confidence in Roofshield and is a great ambassador for the company!  Thanks Rich.

Roofshield were excellent to deal with from start to finish - the quote was detailed and competitive and all work was carried out without incident, efficiently and within expected timeframes.

The Director Josh and his 2IC Danny were a pleasure to work with and met us onsite for inspections and progress checks.

With a job this size there are always minor issues, but the few that came up were resolved amicably and to our satisfaction.

We recommend Roofshield’s services and the company is now our go to roofing expert.

Westminster Gardens Body Corporate Committee, Woodridge.

Roofsheild completed a restoration on my roof today and I cannot fault their work.  I would highly recommend them. The whole team were friendly and very professional from start to finish. From the quote with Esmond who carefully explained the whole process. Then speaking with Tahlia and Josh from the office over the phone who were so helpful. Peter the tradesman who came out and did the work was amazing, great attention to detail, went above and beyond to ensure a great result. After going through some bad experiences with trades for other renovations, this made a refreshing change!  So happy I went with Roofshield!

Thank you, Esmond, for your exceptional work and dedication throughout the entire process. Your professionalism and attention to detail truly made a difference, and the results speak for themselves. I really appreciate your effort and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend you to others.
Very happy with the end result of my roof restoration carried out by the team. Very professional and detailed. Highly recommended.

I recently had my roof restored by Roofshield Roof Restorations, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From the initial inspection through to completion, the team was professional, punctual, and extremely knowledgeable. The fees were also well worth the quality you’re getting.

A special mention to Esmond, who was fantastic to work with. He took the time to clearly explain the condition of the roof, the work required, and the options available, which gave me a lot of confidence in the process. He was also down-to-earth, sincere, and clearly knew what he was talking about.

The workmanship was excellent — the roof looks as good as new — and the attention to detail really stood out. Communication throughout the project was smooth, and everything was completed on schedule with no surprises. The team also made sure the site was clean and tidy once the job was done.

I would highly recommend Esmond of Roofshield Roof Restorations to anyone looking for quality roofing solutions. Great experience all around! Thanks Esmond.

Overdue review. Had some roofing issues and was referred to Roofshield by a family friend to restore my roof. Overall very smooth experience.

From the start, Esmond was easy to deal with and responsive when arranging the inspection. When he came down, he didn’t just give a generic answer, he walked me through what the issue actually was, what needed to be fixed, and what didn’t. I appreciated that he was upfront and didn’t try to push for unnecessary work.

The whole process was quite fuss-free. Once we agreed on the scope, everything was handled efficiently and within the expected timeline. I was also quite impressed by the quality of their work and their in-house products. More importantly, things have been holding up well since, which is really what matters for this kind of job.

Overall, a very straightforward and reliable experience. Would definitely consider going back to him again (hopefully not so soon), and would recommend them highly.

Engaged Roofshield to carry out full restoration for my home. My experience with them from start to finish has been truly exceptional. Transparent, very informative and extremely professional. Cannot recommend them enough. Thank you!

analysis.summary: Customers are polarized, with many praising the professionalism, communication, and quality of work, while others report severe issues with warranty enforcement, poor project management, and unfinished jobs.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: Rich was informative and helpful and worked to get us good value. He explained the entire process in detail.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Deidre
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Testimonials section highlighting transparency and value

quotable_for_redesign.quote: Great contact throughout and photos sent to me at each visit to help me understand the issues and resolutions.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Paul
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Trust section emphasizing communication and customer care

quotable_for_redesign.quote: We could not be happier with the workmanship, attention to detail and politeness of all staff and tradespeople.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Christine
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Hero section proof of quality and professionalism

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data, suggesting a potential gap in active reputation management.
redesign_hooks: Highlight the 'photos at each visit' feature in the service process section to address communication concerns.
Use the 'good value' and 'detailed explanation' quotes to counter price sensitivity and build trust.
Address warranty concerns proactively in an FAQ section, given the negative review about hoops to jump through.
